nasb.text: And they were not permitted to kill anyone, but to torment for five months; and their torment was like the torment of a scorpion when it stings a man.

esv.text: They were allowed to torment them for five months, but not to kill them, and their torment was like the torment of a scorpion when it stings someone.

cnv.text: 蝗蟲沒有能力殺死他們，只可使他們受痛苦五個月。他們的痛苦就像人給蠍子螫了的痛苦一樣。

ccb.text: 但不可杀死他们，只折磨他们五个月。那种折磨就像被蝎子蛰到一样。

csbs.text: 可是不准许杀死这些人，只可使他们受折磨五个月。他们所受的折磨，就像人被蝎子螫到时的折磨那样。
